        self.age = age
        self.race = race
        self.employment_status = employment_status
        self.education = education
        self.marital_status = marital_status
        self.religion = religion
        self.GPA = GPA
        self.enrollment_status = enrollment_status

    def eligible_for_scholarship(self) -> bool:
        valid_genders = ['transgender', 'non-binary', 'male', 'female', 'gender neutral']
        valid_ages = [28, 30, 31, 44, 45, 46, 59, 60, 61]
        valid_races = ['asian', 'white', 'black', 'hispanic', 'indian']
        valid_employment_status = ['employed', 'retired', 'unemployed', 'student']
        valid_education = ['high school', 'college', 'bachelor', 'master', 'doctor']
        valid_marital_status = ['single', 'married', 'widowed', 'divorced', 'legally separated']
        valid_religion = ['christianity', 'islam', 'atheist', 'hinduism', 'buddhism']
        valid_GPAs = [3.5, 3.7]
        valid_enrollment_status = ['full_time', 'part_time']

        if (self.gender.gender in valid_genders and
                self.age.age in valid_ages and
                self.race.race in valid_races and
                self.employment_status.employment_status in valid_employment_status and
                self.education.education in valid_education and
                self.marital_status.marital_status in valid_marital_status and
                self.religion.religion in valid_religion and
                self.GPA.GPA in valid_GPAs and
                self.enrollment_status.enrollment_status in valid_enrollment_status):
            return True
        else:
            return False
